kindreds.name: Kindreds of Middle-earth
kindreds.node.keen_eyes.name: Keen Eyes
kindreds.node.keen_eyes.flavor: The Eldar see further and truer than any other people under the stars.
kindreds.node.stonesense.name: Stonesense
kindreds.node.stonesense.flavor: A Dwarf never truly loses his way in the deep places of the world.
